Bash(node -e "const XLSX=require\('xlsx'\);const wb=XLSX.readFile\('C:/Users/Rafał/Downloads/lista lokali.xlsx'\);for\(const name of wb.SheetNames\){console.log\('=== Sheet:',name,'==='\);const rows=XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(wb.Sheets[name],{header:1,defval:''}\);rows.slice\(0,80\).forEach\(\(r,i\)=>console.log\(i,JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\);}")

Bash(node -e "const XLSX=require\('xlsx'\);const wb=XLSX.readFile\('C:/Users/Rafał/Downloads/lista lokali.xlsx'\);for\(const name of wb.SheetNames\){console.log\('=== Sheet:',name,'==='\);const rows=XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(wb.Sheets[name],{header:1,defval:''}\);rows.slice\(0,100\).forEach\(\(r,i\)=>console.log\(i,JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\);}")

Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const XLSX=require\('\\''xlsx'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{const wb=XLSX.readFile\('\\''C:/Users/Rafał/Downloads/lista lokali.xlsx'\\''\);const rows=XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]],{header:1,defval:'\\'''\\''}\);const valid=new Set\(rows.slice\(1\).map\(r=>r[0]\).filter\(Boolean\)\);const all=await p.unit.findMany\({select:{id:true,number:true}}\);const stale=all.filter\(u=>!valid.has\(u.number\)\);console.log\('\\''Stale units to remove:'\\'',stale.map\(s=>s.number\)\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')

Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{const ids=\(await p.unit.findMany\({where:{number:{in:['\\''M-13'\\'','\\''G-01'\\'']}},select:{id:true,number:true}}\)\);console.log\('\\''targets:'\\'',ids\);for\(const u of ids\){const cu=await p.contractUnit.findMany\({where:{unitId:u.id},include:{contract:true}}\);const clu=await p.clientUnit.findMany\({where:{unitId:u.id},include:{client:true}}\);const sr=await p.serviceRequest.findMany\({where:{unitId:u.id}}\);console.log\(u.number,'\\''-> contractUnits:'\\'',cu.length,'\\''contracts:'\\'',cu.map\(x=>x.contract.number\),'\\''clientUnits:'\\'',clu.length,'\\''clients:'\\'',clu.map\(x=>x.client.firstName+'\\'' '\\''+x.client.lastName\),'\\''service:'\\'',sr.length\);}await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')

Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);\(async\(\)=>{const stale=['\\''M-13'\\'','\\''G-01'\\''];const units=await p.unit.findMany\({where:{number:{in:stale}},select:{id:true,number:true}}\);const ids=units.map\(u=>u.id\);const cuDel=await p.clientUnit.deleteMany\({where:{unitId:{in:ids}}}\);const ctuDel=await p.contractUnit.deleteMany\({where:{unitId:{in:ids}}}\);const srDel=await p.serviceRequest.updateMany\({where:{unitId:{in:ids}},data:{unitId:null}}\);const uDel=await p.unit.deleteMany\({where:{id:{in:ids}}}\);console.log\('\\''Removed clientUnit:'\\'',cuDel.count,'\\''contractUnit:'\\'',ctuDel.count,'\\''serviceReq unlinked:'\\'',srDel.count,'\\''units:'\\'',uDel.count\);const total=await p.unit.count\(\);console.log\('\\''Total units now:'\\'',total\);await p.$disconnect\(\);}\)\(\)')
